pvptweaks.config.title: PVP Tweaks – Settings
pvptweaks.config.textures.endCrystalScal: Scales the End Crystal entity render. 100 = default size.
Scales the Totem item in first-person and hotbar. 100 = default.
pvptweaks.config.sounds.explosionVolumeP: Multiplies volume for explosion sounds. 0 = silent, 100 = normal, 200 = double.
pvptweaks.config.sounds.hitVolumePct.too: Multiplies volume for player/entity hurt sounds.
pvptweaks.config.sounds.crystalPopVolume: Multiplies volume for End Crystal death / explosion sounds.
pvptweaks.config.particles.explosionPart: Percentage of explosion particles to render. 0 = none, 100 = all.
pvptweaks.config.particles.crystalPartic: Percentage of End Crystal ambient/death particles to render.
pvptweaks.config.particles.showHitPartic: Toggle the damage / critical hit particle effects.
